jd.location: Nishi-Shinjuku, Shinjuku-ku, Tokyo; 3 days in office and 2 days remote work available
jd.rawJD:
AI Evaluation Scientist
Company: JAPAN AI
Location: Nishi-Shinjuku, Tokyo; hybrid, 3 days in office and 2 days remote.
Role scope: Design and operate AI-agent quality evaluation infrastructure, benchmarks, rubrics, automated evaluation pipelines, production quality gates, regression testing, safety evaluation, hallucination detection, statistical experiments, and quality reporting.
Requirements: 3+ years in ML, data science, research engineering, or AI evaluation; practical LLM evaluation, benchmark design, LLM-as-Judge, statistics, experimental design, Python evaluation pipelines, and machine-learning frameworks.
Preferred: reward modeling, RLHF or DPO, AI safety, red teaming, construct validity, multi-agent and tool-use evaluation, large-scale data processing, CI/CD integration, research-paper implementation, and technical English.

parsed.location: Nishi-Shinjuku, Shinjuku-ku, Tokyo; 3 days in office and 2 days remote work available
responsibilities: and operation of AI agent quality-evaluation infrastructure
Research and develop evaluation metrics including LLM-as-Judge calibration
and maintain evaluation benchmarks and evaluation sets using synthetic data and real logs
Design and implement scalable automated evaluation pipelines
Integrate evaluation pipelines into production CI/CD and build scalable quality gates
Design agent evaluation harnesses supporting multi-turn interactions
Ensure reproducibility and reliability of evaluation pipelines
Research and implement automated red teaming and adversarial testing
Build safety and policy compliance verification frameworks
Research and implement hallucination detection and calibration methods
Design and execute prompt and tool regression tests
Design and analyze statistical experiments including A/B tests and significance testing
Visualize quality trends and automate regression detection
Create quality reports and improvement proposals
Feed evaluation signals back to research and development teams
Ensure production product quality for products used by approximately 200 companies
requirements: 3+ years of practical experience as an ML Engineer
Research or implementation experience in ML model evaluation or LLM evaluation
Deep knowledge of LLM and generative AI evaluation methods including benchmark design
Practical knowledge of statistics and experimental design including hypothesis testing
Experience building ML or evaluation pipelines in Python
Practical experience with machine learning frameworks such as PyTorch
Experience designing and implementing evaluation metrics beyond precision/recall
At least one of the following language capabilities: fluent Japanese able to discuss product development without friction
preferredQualifications: Publication experience at top ML/NLP conferences such as NeurIPS
Research or implementation experience with reward modeling or preference learning such as RLHF or DPO
Experience with LLM-as-Judge calibration and rubric design
Knowledge or experience in AI safety
Experience with benchmark design and validity verification such as IRT or construct validity
Large-scale data processing experience such as Spark or BigQuery
Experience integrating ML or evaluation pipelines into CI/CD
parsed.employerSignal: JAPAN AI, Inc. was established in April 2023 as a group company of Geniee, Inc. on the TSE Growth Market. The company is rapidly expanding its enterprise AI agent suite including JAPAN AI AGENT, CHAT, and SPEECH. The role sits in a new specialized organization focused on scientifically evaluating AI output quality, safety, and reliability for products used by approximately 200 companies. The development organization has approximately 120 members, and the broader startup has grown to 200+ people and 9 products in 3 years.
risks: Role requires specialized ML/LLM evaluation research or implementation experience
Requires strong statistics and experimental design capability
Requires Python ML/evaluation pipeline experience and practical ML framework experience
Language requirement requires either fluent Japanese for product development discussions or business-level English
Fixed overtime of 45 hours is included in monthly compensation
Greenfield role may require building evaluation methodology and production infrastructure from scratch
High accountability because evaluation infrastructure is described as the last line of defense for release quality
parsed.fitNotes: Strong fit for candidates with ML, data science, research engineering, or AI evaluation backgrounds who can combine statistical experimental design, LLM evaluation methodology, automated pipelines, and AI safety practices. The role is less suitable for candidates whose experience is primarily manual testing or business analysis without ML evaluation, Python pipeline, statistics, or LLM evaluation depth.
